title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: Generating significant buzz on Netflix with a 7.2 IMDb rating from over 65,000 pre-release votes, bolstered by a popular cast including Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
reason: A new Marvel Studios series on Disney+, featuring a 7.5 IMDb rating from over 27,000 votes, driven by the popular MCU brand and lead actor Yahya Abdul-Mateen II.

title: Steal
overview: A typical day at Lochmill Capital is upended when armed thieves burst in and force Zara and her best friend Luke to execute their demands. In the aftermath, conflicted detective Rhys races against time to find out who stole £4 billion pounds of people's pensions and why.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: A highly anticipated Netflix drama with acclaimed leads Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys, evidenced by a strong 7.4 IMDb rating from over 61,000 votes.
